description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes C/C++ code. The workflow should trigger on push to main, on pull requests to main, and on a scheduled cron job. It should use a windows-latest job with read permissions to repository contents, and perform the following steps: check out the repository, install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, initialize CodeQL for C/C++ languages, configure CMake, build the project, and perform CodeQL analysis.
